rationale: Issue split from DRIVERS-1713; converting change stream tests to unified test format, not fixing driver behavior.
Segfault when using mpi4py; Python runtime crash with no spec involvement.
BSON spec requires valid UTF-8 strings; C extension silently encodes invalid UTF-8 Regex patterns that pure Python rejects.
Issue split from DRIVERS-1853, Improvement; adding clustered index support, not fixing a spec nonconformance.
GridFS leaves corrupt state when disk is full; error-handling edge case with no specific contradicted spec rule.
Support question about database backup; no driver bug or spec involvement.
Issue split from DRIVERS-2018, Improvement; adding AWS Lambda documentation examples, not a spec conformance issue.
mypy implicit reexport warning; Python type system packaging issue, no spec involvement.
Transactions spec requires primary read preference; driver applied PrimaryPreferred when directConnection=True in a transaction.
CSOT RTT computation fails with TypeError when load-balanced mode has no SDAM RTT; spec-required timeout logic broken.
Adding macOS M1 wheel build support for pymongocrypt; build/packaging, no spec involvement.
Issue split from DRIVERS-2386; improving reliability of SDAM heartbeat error spec tests, not fixing driver behavior.
Improvement to allow change stream resume after CSOT timeout; proactive spec feature addition, no prior incorrect behavior stated.
Issue split from DRIVERS-2395; adding spec test asserting reads are not retried in transactions, test infrastructure work.
Regression: change stream not closed after NonResumableChangeStreamError; spec defines non-resumable errors must close the stream.
Issue split from DRIVERS-2355; ensuring consistent crypt_shared and server versions in CI, not a driver behavior fix.
Adding fork-safety stress test; internal test improvement with no spec involvement.
Making MongoClient fork-safe via os.register_at_fork; internal implementation improvement, no spec rule violated.
Encryption spec test has wrong maxServerVersion (4.0 vs 4.0.99) causing spurious failures; test metadata fix.
Issue split from DRIVERS-1975, Improvement; adding C2C replication change stream visibility, proactive spec rollout.
Obsolete 'tls' extra on PyPI page; packaging/docs issue with no spec involvement.
Issue split from DRIVERS-2412, Improvement; SDAM electionId priority update for >=6.0, proactive spec rollout not prior incorrect behavior.
Issue split from DRIVERS-1954, Bug; SDAM spec requires electionId priority over setVersion; driver had wrong ordering.
Dead link in README; documentation issue with no spec involvement.
Single-sourcing version string in build system; internal packaging improvement with no spec involvement.
Duplicate line 25; same ticket as line 24, single-sourcing version string, internal build tooling.
Issue split from DRIVERS-2377, Improvement; adding GCP attached service account KMS support, new feature not a nonconformance.
Python generic type hints don't enforce insert type safety; type system API ergonomics, no spec involvement.
GridFSBucket.download_to_stream performance regression; perf issue with no spec rule violated.
GridOut.readline/read slow due to excessive buffer copying; internal performance issue, no spec rule violated.
Issue split from DRIVERS-2411, Improvement; adding Azure VM managed identity KMS support, new feature not a nonconformance.
Improving type-checking documentation for _id field; docs improvement with no spec involvement.
Issue split from DRIVERS-2489; improving spec test coverage for retryable handshake errors, test infrastructure work.
BulkWrite InsertOne type parameter doesn't enforce collection type in mypy; Python type annotation issue, no spec involvement.
AttributeError in MongoCrypt.__del__ during interpreter shutdown; pymongocrypt lifecycle bug, no spec rule involved.
Issue split from DRIVERS-2327, Bug; retryable writes spec requires propagating original error for NoWritesPerformed; driver did not.
Issue split from DRIVERS-2369, Bug; spec requires causal consistency disabled in implicit sessions; driver enabled it incorrectly.
CodecOptions docs missing 'ignore' handler option; documentation omission with no spec nonconformance.
Switching CI tooling from mongodl.py to CRYPT_SHARED_LIB for downloading crypt_shared; CI plumbing change.
Issue split from DRIVERS-2449, Improvement; avoiding mongocryptd client when shared library loaded, proactive spec rollout.
Sphinx docs page rendering bug showing wrong text under version constant; documentation issue only.
Issue split from DRIVERS-2490, Improvement; removing deprecated getNonce for 6.2+, proactive spec rollout not prior nonconformance.
Issue split from DRIVERS-2286, Improvement; adding range index support, new feature not a nonconformance.
PyRight/IntelliSense highlights methods due to CodecOptions generic type issue; Python type system ergonomics, no spec involvement.
Improvement to add exception class similar to Java's MongoUpdatedEncryptedFieldsException; feature addition not a spec nonconformance or behavioral divergence.
bson.json_util.loads type annotation incorrectly restricts to str only; type annotation bug, no spec involvement.
Sphinx documentation formatting and syntax highlighting issues; docs only, no spec involvement.
Adding blacken-docs pre-commit hook for code formatting in docs; dev tooling, no spec involvement.
Adding CMK rotation documentation example; docs improvement with no spec nonconformance.
MONGODB-AWS auth examples should use mongodb+srv; documentation improvement, no spec nonconformance.
